vocab.example: My parents assigned me a small patch of the garden to care for some ornamental shrubs when I was about ten.
I learned early on that without nutrient-rich soil, even the hardiest seedlings would struggle to thrive.
It was incredibly rewarding to see the first tender shoots poking through the surface after weeks of watering.

vocab.meaning: những loài cây được yêu thích quanh năm
vocab.example: Sunflowers were perennial favorites in our neighborhood, and nearly every child tried to grow the tallest one.
My grandfather taught me how to prune back the overgrown branches to encourage more vigorous growth in the spring.
I kept a small wooden crate on the windowsill filled with aromatic herbs like basil and mint.
Growing tropical fruits was quite difficult given the harsh climatic conditions of the region where I grew up.

vocab.meaning: ánh nắng lốm đốm (xuyên qua kẽ lá)
vocab.example: The ferns I planted thrived best in the dappled sunlight beneath the large oak tree in our backyard.
I used to press dried leaves and flowers into a heavy book, creating my own collection of botanical specimens.

vocab.meaning: sự phá hoại của sâu bệnh
vocab.example: I was devastated when my tomato plants were ruined by a sudden pest infestation during a particularly humid summer.
